title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Discuss how the shift to remote work affects these areas of life, then decide which two are the most challenging for companies to manage.

script.text: How important do you think this topic is in today's world?
Do you think people's attitudes to this will change in the future? Why / why not?
Please discuss how working from home affects these different aspects of professional life.
Now decide which two aspects are the hardest for employers to get right.
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.

questions.question: How important do you think this topic is in today's world?
Do you think people's attitudes to this will change in the future? Why / why not?
